calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-30-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on a regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: F. Dias/Sajja Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lee Batara.
Petitioner, Joshua Hunter Hawver in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the decree changing name to Joshua Hunter Jozewik.
Order signed in open court.
